scripts.diagnose: npm run build --silent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env dist/cli.js diagnose
scripts.eval:offline: npm run build --silent && LLM_MODE=mock node --env-file-if-exists=.env dist/cli.js eval
scripts.eval:online: npm run build --silent && LLM_MODE=openai node --env-file-if-exists=.env dist/cli.js eval
scripts.replay: npm run build --silent && LLM_MODE=mock node --env-file-if-exists=.env dist/cli.js replay
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run eval:offline
scripts.hitl-demo: npm run build --silent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env dist/cli.js hitl-demo
